transcript.text:
It's jjampong (spicy seafood noodles), but Neoguri flavored
[Neoguri Jjampong?] *Neoguri is a Ramyun brand
It's just like Neoguri
I think they use their seasoning
[No! 43 years of tradition!]
We usually don't allow filming
But that dude gave permission
[Did I do a good job?]
Thank you sir!
[Eating well thanks to him]
How are you not fat?
Hello everyone
I'm here at Chungju today
This place seems like it doesn't have any restaurants
Wow, amazing
The place looks 100 years old

As you can see, it's no joke
It's been 30-40 years
The regulars know what's up
[Hole in the wall]
It's just like the instant noodle Neoguri
And an interesting mix of jjampong flavor
Hello
We heard about the rumor
Idk, people say that we're popular
I'll order everything on the menu as a simple lunch
Jjajangmyun (black bean noodles), jjampong, udon, tangsuyuk (sweet & sour pork)
Ordering it all
[Eating it all?]
[You look familiar]
Aren't you Tzuyang? Yes I am
[Ready to eat]

3 bowls of noodles Will you be okay?
It will be no problem at all
Delicious
It's good
Do I like the sauce poured? I just eat
Either way, it's good
Completely soaked
[Need the thumbnail]
It's gotten smaller already I need to recover it
There
[Just a sec]
We usually don't allow filming
He gave permission over the phone I would've personally said no
I was just told the dude said okay
[Oops]
Let's go make jjampong

[Neoguri Jjampong with 43 years of tradition]
[A Korean's limited patience]
Thank you
How did you know I needed a drink?
I need something to drink I don't see any convenience store
Thank you
Thank you
Looks good
It's huge
Looking tasty
Thank you
2 elders run this place, so it does take a little bit of time
I really want to start eating, but I'll wait for everything for the thumbnail
Nah, let's just eat
So good
Very tender

As you can see here
A lot of black pepper and vegetables Shrimp!
Let's try the soup to see if it really does taste like Neoguri
There's seaweed in here
Very similar to Neoguri
I see why it's called Neoguri jjampong The noodles are thick
Very thick That's why it's Neoguri
It's good
The noodles taste more like Neoguri
Some udon this time
It has webfoot octopus
Nvm, it's squid
Some jjampong soup first
Wait, it's udon
It's delicious
What? Really good

Long noodle
Udon tastes so good Incredible
Jjajangmyun
Pork
Yummy
Looks tasty
I love it
It has potatoes
I really like it when they put potatoes
It's been a really long time
Their sauce is good too
The noodles are thick, but I don't taste a lot of flour
Yum
My Yokji Island's Hangyang video used to have the highest views on my channel
I ate just like this that day
It feels similar

[Footage from Yokji Island's noodle mukbang]
Plum juice I got from earlier
It didn't really taste like Neoguri on the first bite
But it's like it the more I eat
Tangsuyuk is good too
Some squid
The noodles are very long
Perfect for the noodle slurp
The soup is so addicting
I think jjampong tastes a little better
Yum
The fried pork is very chewy
Tasty
Done with jjajangmyun
That reminds me of Mr. Lee Bong Won
Death to Japchae!

Death to Jjajangmyun!
Jjampong too
There's a lot of seaweed
It's good
Jjampong tastes better now
Shrimp
The shell is very thin and soft
It's gotta be good
I've already messed my shirt up
Did you eat all of that alone?
Well, I'm not finished yet
That black pepper
I almost choked
Amazing
How aren't you fat?!
I don't even eat like that and I get fat

Everything I eat goes to fat Why don't you get fat?
What's your name? Tzuyang
Tzu-rirang?
